It was creative work, precise work, satisfying work. I designed pieces, worked with customers, built something with my hands.\n\nWhen that company closed, I went back to school for digital media at Illinois State University. I was building on the same foundation — art, design, communication, technology — just with new tools.\n\nThat's where I met Professor McHale. That's where I learned that stories matter more than facts, and clarity matters above all."}]]}]]}]]}],["$","article","03",{"className":"relative","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"absolute left-8 top-24 bottom-0 w-px bg-[#1a1f2e]/20"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex gap-8","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex-shrink-0 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#1a1f2e] text-[#f7f5f0] flex items-center justify-center font-serif text-xl font-bold","children":"03"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex-1 pt-2","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-baseline gap-4 mb-4","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"font-serif text-2xl md:text-3xl font-semibold text-[#1a1f2e]","children":"The Designer"}],"$L2"]}],"$L3"]}]]}]]}],"$L4","$L5"]}],"$L6"]}]}],null,"$L7"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"OqSpE8yGkXZGdSN7Jb0cP"}
2:["$","span",null,{"className":"font-mono text-sm text-[#e07a5f]","children":["2011-2016"," · ","Electrolux Small Appliances"]}]
3:["$","div",null,{"className":"prose prose-lg text-[#1a1f2e]/80 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line","children":"I was hired as a designer at Electrolux. Six months later, I was promoted to Creative Director.\n\nThat shift from designer to CD forced me to think about systems, not just pixels. I couldn't personally execute every piece of creative anymore — I had to build the machine that made great creative possible.\n\nI built DAM systems. I implemented Workfront for project management. I discovered that good design isn't just opinion — it's science.\n\nI used 3M's Visual Attention Service to prove that design decisions could be empirically validated. Eye-tracking simulation software showed stakeholders that design wasn't just \"what feels right\" — it was measurable, testable, scientific.\n\nI led creative for Electrolux, Frigidaire, Eureka, 3M, Arm & Hammer — guiding projects from concept to completion across global markets."}]

PIM systems. DAM platforms. 3D visualization pipelines.\n\nI became the person who makes the creative work possible at scale.\n\nI was awarded the 2025 Akeneo Champions Global Ambassador award for my work with PIM implementation and promotion.\n\nI operationalized AEM Assets with Adobe Dynamic Media, integrating DAM with AEM Sites, Magento, Marketo, Workfront, and Adobe Creative Cloud."}]]}]]}]]}]

This site is my attempt to change that."}]]}]]}]]}]
